w:r.w:t: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN COMPUTER SCIENCE
Installation of My Mysql and its environment.
The image demonstrates the initial conceptual planning for the web application framework
JavaScript Form Validation and Password strength Checker
Installation of My Mysql and its environment.
I installed mysql-server and mysql-workbench which is an database app to display the records in tables
This is where Mysql server is running after successful connection of my website to the database
starts the vite development server for my web application.Vite compiles the project successfully and launches it successfully on the local host link.
The figure above shows the hello world test page
The image demonstrates the initial conceptual planning for the web application framework
The figure shows how my web application will appear when opened in a mobile phone
JavaScript Form Validation and Password strength Checker
In the form above, one cannot submit data while username field is empty
The form also includes a password strength checker feature that validates strength of password.
Function designed to evaluate user password strength by evaluation of length, number, uppercase,symbols.
The figure shows a backend script for establishing connection of my web app to my local mysql workbench database.
The figure shows a user interface designed for authentification using a password to access the web app
The figure shows the folder structure for my web application which contains the backend folder and frontend folder .
The figure shows an organized repository history that track addition of features.
The figure above shows user data in a database which were fen in the sign up form
The figure shows sql commands to enable displaying of all users in the database.
The figure shows all movie data submitted by the user in my local mysql workbench database.
